name: macys_public_product_metadata_probe
observed_edge_behavior: An immediate repeat of the sampled PDP sitemap shard later returned edge 403.
Repeated product detail probes later returned 403 or 404 for some IDs.
Rendered Playwright category probe returned a Macy's access-denied page from this environment.
The recommended production path is sitemap-first discovery with conservative, checkpointed detail enrichment.

publishability.reason: Only public robots, sitemap, and unauthenticated product detail observations are included. No cookies, tokens, account data, checkout data, or private session state are included.
